title: German Carrot Salad

ingredients.item: neutral oil (such as sunflower or canola)

instructions: Peel the carrots and shred them using a box grater or a food processor.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, oil, sugar, salt, and pepper until the sugar is dissolved.
Place the shredded carrots in a large mixing bowl and pour the dressing over them.
Toss thoroughly to coat the carrots evenly.
Let the salad sit for at least 10 to 15 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld and the carrots to soften slightly.
substitutions: Apple cider vinegar instead of lemon juice
Honey or maple syrup instead of granulated sugar
Add one grated apple for extra sweetness and crunch
